title: Vanilla Picks (And other tools too)
description: Makes the tools from Better Nether & Better End look like vanilla tools. Simple as that.
body:
Vanilla Picks is a simple resource pack that changes the tools in Better Nether & Better End to use a more "vanilla style" texture.

I made this for my own modpack to make things more consistent across the board. 

![A preview of how the tools look.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207cb8f10cd7a78b762442888ebda3ed74b14155.png)

Whilst not having Better Nether or Better End won't break your game, the resource pack won't do a whole lot without them..
